description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in navy blue and red with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this fabric and synthetic leather bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Handbag with one main zipped compartment that has an inner zipped pocket One pocket on the front with a metallic buttoned and velcro closure One zipped pocket at the back One long adjustable handle for carrying ease Stitch detailing and branding on the front Material and Care Blended fabric and synthetic leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 26 cm Width: 34 cm Depth: 10 cm
